title: What's Moving
description: Spec-silent shape (spec sec-2.5/sec-5 name the artifact but not its fields; decision logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md). data/whats_moving.json is a pure-code, no-AI 7-day topic-velocity snapshot computed from Hacker News mention counts, one entry per card topic tag, each carrying exactly 7 daily counts (oldest first) so the frontend's inline-SVG sparkline (site/lib/svg_sparkline.py) can render it directly, plus a pre-computed trend label so 'accelerating vs cooling' is never inferred client-side from color/slope alone (accessibility rule).

daily_counts.description: HN AI-story mention counts for this topic, oldest day first, most recent day last.
